overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city street. The player moves past holographic advertisements, palm trees with glowing bases, and approaches a building entrance with vibrant pink and cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with holographic advertising pillars

events.description: pedestrian in brown jacket walks past camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the neon-lit street toward the towering skyscrapers in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera then passing by on the right side wearing a brown jacket

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillar displaying rotating holographic advertisements with red and pink abstract patterns
large red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on the building facade
towering skyscraper with illuminated windows and multiple holographic billboards
metal railings with cyan neon accent lighting lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, dominated by a large cylindrical holographic advertising pillar on the right displaying shifting red and pink patterns. The player walks forward past metal railings with cyan neon accents toward a distant glass skyscraper, while a pedestrian in a brown jacket approaches and passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined commercial boulevard with neon ground lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past palm trees with glowing cyan ring bases

entered.detail: palm trees with glowing cyan neon rings around their bases lining the center of the sidewalk
building with large pink neon 'EL GUAPO' signage and curved yellow facade
vertical traffic signal showing red hand indicating no crossing

segments.scene_description: Having passed the holographic pillars, the scene opens into a palm-lined boulevard where the El Guapo building with its prominent pink neon signage becomes visible on the right. The player walks past palm trees with glowing cyan bases while the distant skyscraper grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance plaza with exterior stairway and food vendor

events.description: turning left toward the El Guapo building entrance and exterior stairway

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance and turning toward the exterior stairway with neon accents

entered.detail: wide exterior staircase with red textured walls and metal railings leading upward between buildings
small food stall with cyan neon lighting and striped awning located at the base of the stairs
motorcycles parked near the base of the exterior stairway

segments.scene_description: The player turns toward the El Guapo building entrance, revealing an exterior stairway with red walls leading upward. A small food vendor stall with cyan neon lighting sits at the base of the stairs next to parked motorcycles, while the palm trees now line the left side of the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic street that transitions from a dense commercial corridor into the entrance of a vibrant entertainment venue. It begins by moving past a large cylindrical holographic pillar displaying shifting red and pink patterns, gliding along metal railings with cyan accents as a pedestrian passes by. As the camera moves forward, the view opens into a palm-lined boulevard where the glowing cyan bases of the trees lead the way toward the prominent pink neon signage of the El Guapo building. The scene then shifts as the player turns toward the building's entrance, revealing a small food vendor stall and parked motorcycles nestled against red exterior walls. Finally, the perspective settles on a stairway leading upward, with the palm trees now lining the left side of the approach.
